title: pouteria quicheana
intro: Pouteria quicheana, also known as the Amazonian biriba, is a tree species native to the Amazon rainforest in South America. The medicinal properties of Pouteria quicheana include its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate inflammation. The health benefits of consuming Pouteria quicheana include its potential to improve digestive health, boost the immune system, and provide antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Pouteria quicheana include infusions and decoctions made from its roots, bark, or leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or used topically to treat skin conditions.
